topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a high-signal, high-volume query-page mismatch on an existing cornerstone page with clear intent around redeem codes and Gift Center login. It fits the Economy cluster and can likely improve first-screen usefulness without changing site structure. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Helps players find the correct redeem path faster, reduces confusion around Gift Center login and UID, and better matches search intent.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium. The page already owns this topic space, so changes must preserve cluster role separation and avoid overlapping with other canonical pages.
claims_to_verify: Whether codes.html remains the best canonical page for all Gift Center related queries.
Whether the existing canonical claims about redeem flow, mailbox rewards, and cluster role separation remain accurate and should be preserved unchanged.
Whether any query variants require new first-screen structure rather than broader page rewrites.
topics.next_step: Human review should validate which query intents are already covered, confirm the canonical claims to preserve, and define a scoped update brief for the existing page only.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 40033 impressions, 733 clicks, 1.83% CTR, avg position 6.01.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3169 impressions, 121 clicks, 3.82% CTR, position 6.58.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 903 impressions, 46 clicks, 5.09% CTR, position 5.14.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 683 impressions, 29 clicks, 4.25% CTR, position 5.96.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 508 impressions, 25 clicks, 4.92% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a strong existing-page opportunity with meaningful impressions and a reasonable CTR gap, pointing to query-to-page refinement rather than new content creation. It fits the Events cluster and appears suitable for a scoped update to the current guide. Prior run `2026-05-10-alliance-duel-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Improves schedule discovery and day-by-day planning for players searching for alliance duel timing and strategy.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium. The topic should not be expanded into a broader events hub if another canonical page already serves that role.
claims_to_verify: Whether alliance-duel.html is still the best canonical page for last z vs schedule intent.
Whether the proposed schedule and day 1-6 framing is accurate and current.
Whether another events page already serves this query better.
topics.next_step: Human review should confirm the target intent, verify whether the page can absorb the missing schedule and strategy context without breaking cluster separation, and define the minimal update scope.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8912 impressions, 434 clicks, 4.87% CTR, avg position 6.10.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner approved exact Alliance Duel schedule/content intent changes. Manual apply was used for first-screen/meta operations, followed by strict QA.
